# MoonCat Knowledge Base

Plain-text and Markdown entrypoints:

- /README.md
- /AGENTS.md
- /data/agent-index.json
- /data/agent-query-cases.json
- /data/agent-context-packs.json
- /data/agent-coding-patterns.json
- /docs/agent-usage.md
- /data/kb-manifest.json
- /data/kb-audit-report.json
- /docs/kb-integrity.md
- /data/architecture-decisions.json
- /docs/architecture-decisions.md
- /data/task-recipes.json
- /data/kb-gap-index.json
- /docs/identifier-verification.md
- /docs/color-classification.md
- /docs/materialization-parity.md
- /data/upstream-snapshot-manifest.json
- /data/mooncat-accessories-internals.json
- /data/mooncat-accessory-images-internals.json
- /docs/overview.md
- /docs/source-map.md
- /docs/glossary.md
- /docs/mooncat-types.md
- /docs/color-math.md
- /docs/traits-and-ids.md
- /docs/identifier-conventions.md
- /docs/contracts.md
- /docs/rescue-history.md
- /docs/api-notes.md
- /data/sources.json
- /data/mooncat-types.json
- /data/character-cats.json
- /data/character-cat-index.json
- /data/special-cats.json
- /data/color-hues.json
- /data/trait-index.json
- /data/identifier-conventions.json
- /data/rescue-ranges.json
- /data/rescue-buckets.json
- /data/contracts.json
- /data/ipfs-cids.json
- /data/api-endpoints.json
- /data/project-links.json
- /data/link-index.json
- /data/protocol-constants.json

Notes:

- For task-specific agent context, load /data/agent-index.json before broader docs or data files.
- For covered coding tasks, load the matching generated pack from /data/agent-context-packs.json; then inspect only the referenced underlying files.
- For repo-wide integrity work, load /data/kb-manifest.json and /docs/kb-integrity.md, then run the documented zero-network audit commands.
- For architecture-decision questions, use /data/architecture-decisions.json before broader implementation sources and preserve its intent-versus-evidence limits.
- Use /data/ for exact canonical or curated data.
- Use /docs/ for explanations and reasoning.
- Incomplete information is marked explicitly and should not be filled by guesswork.
